title: SshRunDocument
description: Executes an SSH::Exec::Document against a specific SSH target.

documentName.description: Name of the SSH::Exec::Document to execute. Resolved via doc.attrName token.

documentType.description: Resolved document type. Populated via doc.attrDocumentType token.

content.description: Resolved script content (Command documents). Populated via doc.attrContent token.

mainSteps.description: Resolved step list (Automation documents). Populated via doc.attrMainSteps token.

parameterValues.description: Values to substitute for parameters declared in the document.

host.description: SSH target hostname or IP address.

privateKeyPath.description: Absolute path to the private key file on the machine running cdkx deploy.

executionId.description: Unique execution identifier, assigned by the runtime on create.
